name: Pennzoil 400 presented by Jiffy Lube
comments: Josh Berry won the Pennzoil 400 at Las Vegas Motor Speedway, his first NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the green flag, the following cars dropped to the rear: No. 12 (DNQ), Nos. 20, 35, 42, 47 (unapproved adjustments).
